title: Japanese Crispy Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy Japanese-inspired stir fry with crispy vegetables and a flavorful sauce.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and cook for 2-3 minutes, until crispy.
Add the carrot and pepper, cook for 4-5 minutes, until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together stir-fry sauce, soy sauce, and sugar.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir to coat.
Add the crispy fried shallots and stir to combine.
Serve immediately, garnished with sesame seeds and green onions.
Cook the wheat flour into a crispy batter and sprinkle over the top.
Serve with steamed rice or noodles.
Cook for 15-20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Stir-fry sauce can be made ahead of time and stored in the fridge for up to 1 week.
